note: M1.3 golden corpus. Good specs decode AND are semantically valid (M1.4/M1.5 goldens). Bad specs: decodes=false => rejected now at decode_spec; decodes=true => decodes now, blocked later at `check`. Layer/check taxonomy = VPlot_SEMANTICS.md.

good_specs.summary: group_by month -> sum revenue as total_revenue -> sort month asc
group_by region -> sum revenue as total_revenue -> sort total_revenue desc
group_by month -> sum orders as total_orders -> sort month asc
group_by region -> mean revenue as avg_revenue -> sort region asc
group_by city -> max temp_c as max_temp -> sort max_temp desc

good_specs.intent: Plot temperature over time for each city.
good_specs.summary: select date, city, temp_c -> line with color=city

good_specs.intent: Show total revenue by month for the NA region.
good_specs.summary: filter region eq NA -> group_by month -> sum revenue -> sort month asc
group_by month -> min revenue as min_revenue -> sort month asc

bad_specs.reason: transform op 'pivot' is outside the allowlisted tagged union
filter value 1.5 is a JSON float; strict decode rejects float tokens
channel carries unknown key 'title'; the model proposes no titles
version 'vplot-0.2' is not the pinned literal 'vplot-0.1'
Vega-Lite encoding-level 'aggregate' refused at decode (M1.6 injection vector)
Vega-Lite top-level 'url' loader refused at decode (M1.6 injection vector)
filter field 'profit' is absent from sales.csv
declared dataset.hash does not match the sales.csv source bytes

bad_specs.caught_by: M1.4 eval / M1.5 checks (input-type rule, semantics §4)
bad_specs.reason: sum requires a numeric column; region is string
int literal 5 cannot coerce to the string column region
y typed quantitative but region is a string column
orders is dropped by the aggregate; not in the plotted table {month,total_revenue}
aqi is quantitative but the weather manifest declares no unit for it
group_by is valid only immediately before an aggregate; here it precedes a sort
measure output 'region' collides with the group key 'region'

enforced_by_construction.transform.aggregates_match_recomputation: renderer inlines only the recomputed data.values; no model-value path exists (M1.5/M1.6) -> no bad-spec attack vector
enforced_by_construction.transform.filters_declared: every filter is a declared transform.filter op; the verifier recomputes from declared transforms only -> an undeclared filter is unrepresentable
enforced_by_construction.scale.bar_quantitative_axis_zero: the renderer sets the bar quantitative-axis baseline to 0 regardless of orientation (vertical or horizontal); the model proposes no scale (M1.6) -> a non-zero baseline is unrepresentable
enforced_by_construction.encoding.legend_domain_matches_data: the renderer derives the color legend domain from the recomputed data (M1.6)
enforced_by_construction.derived_value_mismatch: DROPPED (roadmap data-flow): the model supplies no plotted values, so a derived-value lie is impossible by construction
